description: A man is looking at his mobile phone. In the middle of a street
The screen of his phone glows with a strange code. The man looks confused.
A close-up of the phone shows the virus spreading across the screen.
The man's face starts to contort as if he's feeling pain.
His eyes turn red and his skin changes color, becoming pale.
He begins to stagger and move slowly, now in a zombie-like state.
Passersby scream and run away from the now-zombie man.
The camera pans to show other people turning into zombies one by one.
A group of survivors huddle together, looking over a fence at the chaos.
The final shot shows the cityscape filled with zombies, with a lone survivor walking away in the distance.
